  generate    This runs that Generate Command that queries
              Metadata/Entity-Definitions from Dataverse/Dynamics 365, then
              Generates C# classes based on the metadata.

  list        (Default Verb) This runs the List Command that queries
              Metadata/Entity-Definitions from Dataverse/Dynamics 365, then
              writes a list of entities in the Environment to the console and
              CSV File

  help        Display more information on a specific command.

  version     Display version information.

  -n, --namespace    Required. Provide a namespace to contain the generated
                     code.

  -l, --list         Required. Provide a list of entity logical names to
                     generate for.

  -p, --path         Required. Provides the path where to save to.

  -u, --public       Allows you to generate the classes with Public accessors.

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
